guard_city.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Firm and disciplined. Tone: authoritative and alert. Pacing: measured and clear.

dragon_boss.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Monstrous and intimidating, but intelligible. Tone: menacing and controlled. Pacing: deliberate with short pauses.

merchant_general.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Lively and persuasive. Tone: friendly with subtle urgency. Pacing: brisk but articulate.

merchant.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Lively and persuasive. Tone: friendly and opportunistic. Pacing: brisk and clear.

quest_giver_main.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Mature and reassuring. Tone: wise, calm, and confident. Pacing: deliberate with clear pauses.

player.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Human and natural. Tone: focused and emotionally restrained. Pacing: steady and clear.

elder sophia.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Mature and warm. Tone: thoughtful and grounded. Pacing: steady with intentional pauses.

merchant aldric.openai_instructions: Voice Affect: Charming and fast-thinking. Tone: persuasive and upbeat. Pacing: brisk but readable.
